title: Those who are not co-owners of mineral rights
doc_html:
§169.  Those who are not co-owners of mineral rights

Co-ownership does not exist between the owner of a mineral right and the owner of the land subject to the right or between the owners of separate mineral rights.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §169, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
